steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; function alaska_upsert_page( $slug, $args ) { $existing = get_posts( array( 'name' => $slug, 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'any', 'numberposts' => 1 ) ); $postarr = array_merge( array( 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_name' => $slug ), $args ); if ( $existing ) { $postarr['ID'] = $existing[0]->ID; return wp_update_post( $postarr, true ); } return wp_insert_post( $postarr, true ); } $home_id = alaska_upsert_page( 'home', array( 'post_title' => 'Home', 'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"alaska/page-home-starter"} /-->' ) ); $premium_id = alaska_upsert_page( 'premium', array( 'post_title' => 'Premium Class', 'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"alaska/page-premium-starter"} /-->', 'page_template' => 'page-premium' ) ); if ( ! is_wp_error( $premium_id ) ) { update_post_meta( $premium_id, '_wp_page_template', 'page-premium' ); } $newsroom_id = alaska_upsert_page( 'newsroom', array( 'post_title' => 'Newsroom', 'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"alaska/page-newsroom-starter"} /-->', 'page_template' => 'page-newsroom' ) ); if ( ! is_wp_error( $newsroom_id ) ) { update_post_meta( $newsroom_id, '_wp_page_template', 'page-newsroom' ); } $contact_id = alaska_upsert_page( 'contact', array( 'post_title' => 'Contact', 'post_content' => '<!-- wp:pattern {"slug":"alaska/page-contact-starter"} /-->' ) ); $flights_id = alaska_upsert_page( 'flights', array( 'post_title' => 'Flights', 'post_content' => '', 'page_template' => 'page-flights' ) ); if ( ! is_wp_error( $flights_id ) ) { update_post_meta( $flights_id, '_wp_page_template', 'page-flights' ); } if ( ! is_wp_error( $home_id ) ) { update_option( 'page_on_front', $home_id ); update_option( 'show_on_front', 'page' ); } flush_rewrite_rules(); ?>
